column2: Left piece has major connectivity issues with tje charging dock. Won't connect to the dock on te first try. Needed some squuezing to get it connected. Plus left earpiece has no base and has a dead microphone. Normal sound worked great with left piece and the right piece is working well. You can't expect the highest quality sound with this. But gets the job done. Worth for the price. Recommended to anyone who like to gamble with ears.😅
